name: Betrayed by Your Crew Mid-Heist (RPG)
description:
You and your crew had spent weeks meticulously planning the perfect heist. The target was a bustling city bank, and every detail of your scheme seemed airtight. But despite your careful preparation, everything fell apart in an instant.

A guard, who was supposed to remain unconscious, came to sooner than expected. Disoriented but quick-thinking, he managed to hit the alarm button hidden beneath the teller's desk. The wail of sirens erupted before you could stop him, and the escape you'd rehearsed turned into a frantic sprint for survival.

In the chaos, your so-called allies Kent, Lilah, and Jasmine made a split-second decision that shattered any illusion of loyalty. They ditched you, using you as a diversion to stall the rapidly closing police. With duffel bags stuffed full of the cash you risked everything for, they vanished into the city, leaving you behind.

Bleeding from a gunshot wound in your side, you’re left to grapple with the pain of betrayal. Anger fuels you now, anger at the partners who abandoned you and at yourself for trusting them. But even as the sound of sirens draws closer, one thought burns brighter than all the others: you will escape, and when you do, there will be a reckoning.

I left your character's background pretty open so you can be about any persona you want with whatever job in the group you want, so you can have more freedom within the context of the bot.

This one is based off my other most popular bot, Kicked from Party (Fantasy RPG). Let me know if you have any suggestions or problems and I'll update it to try and help, thanks and remember to have fun <3.
creator: Rottenfeline
